privileged_info_summary: All three textbooks are real OpenStax open educational resources. Psychology 2e (ISBN 978-1975076450) has Rose M. Spielman as the primary author along with William J. Jenkins and Marilyn D. Lovett. Calculus Volume 1 (ISBN 978-1-947172-13-5, digital) is authored by Gilbert Strang and Edwin Herman as senior contributing authors. Microbiology (ISBN 978-1-947172-23-4, digital) is authored by Nina Parker and Mark Schneegurt among other contributors. All three textbooks are freely available in digital format on the OpenStax website (openstax.org) and are available for download as PDFs. The task requires sourcing these specific real-world educational resources from OpenStax.
